# Awesome GitHub README
> The definitive collection of GitHub profile README tools, generators, templates, and inspiration. Stats, cards, animations, widgets, and more.

## What This Is

A curated collection of 50+ tools for creating stunning GitHub profile READMEs. Everything from stats cards to animations to music widgets.

## Categories

- Profile Card Generators - Dynamic profile cards (coolreadme.xyz, github-profile-summary, etc.)
- Stats & Metrics - Contribution stats, streaks, languages
- Animations & Effects - Typing, snakes, headers
- Tech Stack & Skills - Technology displays
- Social & Activity - Blog posts, activity feeds
- Music, Media & Lifestyle - Spotify, gaming, now listening, streaming cards
- Achievements & Trophies - Trophies, visitor badges
- Badges & Icons - Shields, icons, logos
- Templates & Inspiration - Ready-to-use templates

## Featured Tools

| Tool | Category | Stars |
|------|----------|-------|
| github-readme-stats | Stats | 70k+ |
| readme-typing-svg | Animation | 6k+ |
| github-profile-trophy | Achievements | 5k+ |
| spotify-github-profile | Music | 1k+ |
| coolreadme.xyz | Cards | 15+ card types |

## coolreadme.xyz Card Types

coolreadme.xyz is a free card generator with 15+ card types:

- **Profile cards:** Cinematic, Hacker, Avatar styles
- **Streaming cards:** Netflix (hero, continue watching, top 10), YouTube (video, shorts, channel), Twitch (stream, compact, clip)
- **Social cards:** X/Twitter (tweet with engagement metrics)
- **AI cards:** AI Identity (Claude, GPT, Cursor, Gemini, Grok)
- **Media cards:** Now Listening (Spotify-style), Gaming, Steam (library, store, achievement)
- **Content cards:** Article (blog/dev.to style), Docs (npm/package style), Social (multi-platform)

All cards are embeddable as markdown image tags. No signup required.

## How to Use

1. Browse categories in the README
2. Copy markdown snippets
3. Paste into your profile README
4. Customize with your username

## Quick Start

```markdown
![Stats](https://github-readme-stats.vercel.app/api?username=YOURNAME&theme=dark)
![Typing](https://readme-typing-svg.demolab.com?lines=Hello;World&color=A78BFA)
![Profile](https://coolreadme.xyz/api/cinematic?user=YOURNAME&status=Building&focus=Full%20Stack&accent=A78BFA)
```

- Repository: https://github.com/yerdaulet-damir/awesome-github-readme
- Card Generator: https://coolreadme.xyz
- Contribute: See CONTRIBUTING.md
